reference: Hello. The injections can help, but usually only after you have had a few of them. This does not exactly sound like an allergic reaction, but may just be a reaction to having had a needle inserted into your knees. You need to let your doctor know about this and allow him to decide whether you can continue with the injections.
text: Hello, the injections can help, but usually only after you have had a few of them. This does not exactly sound like an allergic reaction, but may just be a reaction to having had a needle inserted into your knee. You need to let your doctor know about this and allow him to decide whether you can continue with the injections.
